name: MHA State of Anarchy
description:
Story

Japan has entered a state of Anarchy after All for One escaped Tartarus, and now the Japanese Government has fell, their last attempt to contain the villains from chaos is by entering Isolation from the outside world. No information enters or exits. But the Government still exists, and is secretly accepting aid from America, South Korea, Taiwan, Indochina, Britain, Poland-Belarus, Germany, the Baltic Union, Czechoslovakia, and Ukraine. Though, as a result. Crime has increased dramatically, pro heroes have been trying their hardest and focused on getting people safe, even Vigilantes started to rise again. General Distrust in Pro Heroes is the biggest reason for why Vigilantes are popping up. Bounty Hunters are a form of Vigilante but they actually actively hunt Criminals and Villains with a big bounty.
creator: SamuraiGaming
